recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Blitz
recommendations.overview: A tough cop is dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Boy
recommendations.overview: A married couple on the verge of separation are leveled by the news their 18-year-old son committed a mass-shooting at his college, then took his own life.

recommendations.title: To Catch a Killer
recommendations.overview: Baltimore. New Year's Eve. A talented but troubled police officer is recruited by the FBI's chief investigator to help profile and track down a mass murderer.

recommendations.title: Lost Bullet
recommendations.overview: A small time delinquent, turned police mechanic for a go fast task force, is forced to defend his innocence when his mentor is killed by dirty cops.

recommendations.title: Natural Born Killers
recommendations.overview: Two victims of traumatized childhoods become lovers and serial murderers irresponsibly glorified by the mass media.

recommendations.title: Gone in Sixty Seconds
recommendations.overview: Ex-car thief Randall Raines is forced out of retirement to save his brother Kip after a boost gone wrong. With the help of allies old and new, they race to meet the demands of notorious crime boss Raymond Calitri as the police are in hot pursuit.

recommendations.title: Colt 45
recommendations.overview: Vincent Miles, a gunsmith and shooting instructor at the National Police, is an expert in combat shooting who stubbornly refuses to join a field brigade, a choice which his colleagues do not understand. When he meets Milo Cardena, a mysterious and sk

recommendations.title: London Boulevard
recommendations.overview: A parolee falls for a reclusive movie star while trying to evade a ruthless gangster.
